events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: Hot work industrial site, photographed from one angle only, critical label/torque sheet/clearance dimension needed for referenced requirement outside frame. Reference NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since critical info outside frame, cannot verify compliance. But task says if dangerous or non-compliant decision must fail. However scenario doesn't describe actual hazards, just says photo one angle, critical label outside frame. We need apply NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Hot work requires fire watch, permits, clearance from combustibles, extinguishers, etc. Since cannot see critical label/torque sheet/clearance dimension, likely needs_more_info. But maybe because hot work at rough-complete stage and no visible permit/fire watch? Need infer from image? No image provided in text. We must decide based on described field condition: "The work around Hot work is photographed from one angle only. The critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension needed for the referenced requirement is outside the frame." That strongly indicates insufficient information to verify compliance. So decision needs_more_info. Risk? Could be high because hot work unverified. But if unknown, maybe medium/high. Need choose. Work_stage rough-complete. component_conditions none flagged -> empty list. percent_complete maybe 70. value 0. confidence moderate. findings: single angle, critical documentation outside frame, cannot confirm clearances, permits, fire watch. actions: re-inspect from all required angles, locate hot work permit, verify clearances and fire watch. references: NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.

events.text: {"decision":{"decision":"needs_more_info","risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":[],"percent_complete":70,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.6,"event_time":0,"rate":0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Hot work condition is shown from only one angle; the critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension needed to verify compliance is outside the frame.","Cannot confirm presence of a valid hot-work permit, required fire watch, or required clearance from combustibles/ignition sources.","Cannot verify that required portable fire extinguishing equipment or other NFPA 51B/OSHA 1926 Subpart J controls are in place."],"actions":["Re-photograph/inspect the hot-work area from all required angles and include the hot-work permit, equipment labels, torque sheets, and clearance dimensions.","Verify a current hot-work permit is posted and that a trained fire watch is assigned and present.","Confirm required portable fire extinguishers, combustible-clearance, and ventilation controls meet NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J before work proceeds."],"rationale":"NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J require documented authorization, fire watch, clearance from combustibles, and suitable fire protection for hot work. The provided view omits the critical documentation/dimension needed to confirm compliance, so a pass/fail determination cannot be made; however, because hot work is inherently hazardous, the missing verification represents a high-risk gap.","references":["NFPA 51B","OSHA 1926 Subpart J"]}}
